problem id: 07d1cd39
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(5) XOR SHR(4)

examples:
  10000011 -> 01101000
  01010010 -> 01000101
  00100001 -> 00100010
  11100000 -> 00001110
  11000000 -> 00001100
  11001111 -> 11101100
  11110001 -> 00101111
  11101010 -> 01001110

query: 00001110
predicted answer: 11000000
